design-internal.name: Design Internal Home
design-internal.description: Lists all available apps and prototypes

long-name-design-vision-prototype-exampl.name: Very Long App Name That Might Wrap Or Overflow In The Card
long-name-design-vision-prototype-exampl.description: This prototype explores a reimagined billing experience end-to-end. It covers invoice creation, approval workflows, payment reconciliation, and multi-currency handling. The intent is to validate the IA and visual hierarchy before committing to a full build cycle.

no-url-yet.name: Not Yet Deployed
no-url-yet.description: This app hasn't been deployed yet — vercelProjectId and url are null.

external-tool.name: External Repo Tool
external-tool.description: Lives in a separate GitHub repo and is deployed independently. Only registered here for the showcase.

multi-tag-app.name: Multi-Tag Entry
multi-tag-app.description: Tagged as both app and prototype to test dual categorisation rendering.

deleted-old-project.name: Deleted Project
deleted-old-project.description: This entry is tagged deleted and should never appear in the UI.

ancient-prototype.name: Ancient Prototype
ancient-prototype.description: Last updated a long time ago — tests how old dates render in the card.

unicode-stress-test.name: Ünïcödé & Spëcïàl Chàrs 🧪
unicode-stress-test.description: Tests rendering of non-ASCII characters: curly quotes “like this”, em-dashes—like this, and emoji 🎨🗂️✅. Useful for catching encoding edge cases.

no-authors.name: No Authors Entry
no-authors.description: An entry with an empty authors array — tests that the UI handles missing author data gracefully.

density-filler-one.name: Density Filler 1
density-filler-one.description: Extra entry to increase visual density and test grid/list layout with more cards.

density-filler-two.name: Density Filler 2
density-filler-two.description: Another filler entry for layout density testing.
